mapper.select: /** UsptWctIoeDao.selectList */ select wct_ioe_id , wct_ioe_nm from uspt_wct_ioe
/** UsptWctIoeDao.selectTaxitmList */ select wct_ioe_id , wct_taxitm_id , wct_taxitm_nm from uspt_wct_taxitm where wct_ioe_id = #{wctIoeId}

/** UsptWctIoeDao.checkIsUse */ select count(distinct ubis.bsns_cd) + count(distinct usis.stdr_bsns_cd) from uspt_wct_ioe uwi left outer join uspt_bsns_ioe_setup ubis on ubis.wct_ioe_id = uwi.wct_ioe_id left outer join uspt_stdr_ioe_setup usis on usis.wct_ioe_id = uwi.wct_ioe_id where uwi.wct_ioe_id = #{wctIoeId}
